raw_input:
[5.0/5] Does the job This cream moisturizes the skin nicely and keeps the skin soft and smooth. Does not have very strong fragrance, which i like.
The box comes with English labels on the our and Korean on the inside. There are no application instructions in english but I believe applying the cream isn’t rocket science.
Overall good product. [5.0/5] Excellent Mosturiser [[VIDEOID:fcb745c510e6a8d3746ee99d7d9ad36]] It is really Hydrating Nourishing Anti-Aging Balancing Panthenol Silky and smooth on my skin
I loved it because its absorbed by my skin very fast
after a little days I felt deference with my hand
More soft Skin and feeling much better than before with other creams
I know its good because of the Panthenol which give the silky touch I need, and give the cure for a lot of dry and wrinkled skin
I will order another one soon after I finish the one I have [5.0/5] Can't Go Wrong with Celleanser Celleanser has fast become one of my wife's favorite Kbeauty skin care brands, maybe even just brands in general and this vegan clean cream is no exception. Lots of moisturizers either smell like a bunch of liquid chemicals squeezed into a tube, feel greasy after applied, are heavy or leave her skin with red streaks and irritate

Not this one. There's none of that here. This feels clean, smells great, isn't too light or dense, goes on real smooth and moisturizes her skin as promised

Even the box is fun to open! [5.0/5] The Toner Delivers it’s Promise! [[VIDEOID:d2b95b7c15ed2b6eaea9b511c54f2fd]] Another superb addition to the Celleanser family! This toner is really terrific in that it helps to maintain a natural skin glow! It fits quite nicely into any skin care routine and leaves your face feeling it’s best! [4.0/5] It's okay This Celleanser clean cream is good, but nothing spectacular. Has a medicinal fragrance that fades quickly. Doesn't leave your skin feeling heavy or greasy and absorbs quickly, but not much hydration! I usually follow about 30 minutes after applying with the Celleanser Therapy Water Bounce Cream for better results. Reasonably priced, and good for when you're on a budget. [5.0/5] I am loving this brand!!! This cream added to my routine really helps keep my skin hydrated all day. I have mature skin and any added hydration that lasts is my new best friend. This is perfect, especially for the Chicago winters! 🧡🧡 [5.0/5] It works well! - Pretty thick cream good for fall or winter, or dry skin
- Dries down to a skinlike finish
- Scent is mild and herbal
- Didn't break me out [4.0/5] English directions/info would be nice First off, I absolutely love that this is right away labeled as both vegan and cruelty-free. It's nice not having to search around and see if a product meets those requirements.

The product itself is a moisturizing cream with little to no scent. It goes on smooth and seems to get absorbed by my skin pretty quickly and doesn't leave much behind in terms of a greasy feeling or anything like that. However, some English instructions or general information would be great here. It says anti-wrinkle, so I assume it's primarily intended for the face, but some confirmation would be great. Other information such as how much to use, how often and when to apply, etc. would also be good. There's a lot of text in Korean on the box, so I assume that's where the info is if there's any. [5.0/5] A Very Nice Hydrating, Soothing, Barrier-Repairing Antioxidant Cream (Ingredients list is at the bottom of this review.)

I have really enjoyed using the Celleanser Vegan Clean Cream, and my skin seems to like it too. I also tried the Celleanser Clean Toner Mist, and the Celleanser Clean Serum. They all worked nicely for my dry, sensitive skin, and they worked nicely together.

This cream has a thick and creamy texture. It is very smooth and soothing to apply to the skin. It soaks in well, but it doesn't disappear. It leaves a nice layer of extra hydration and moisture on the skin. Though, it is lightweight and breathable. Not heavy at all. It is not sticky, and it layers perfectly with other products. The scent is sort of lightly herbal or earthy, similar to many Korean skincare brands.

I will say that the finish isn't my go-to. It isn't really dewy or glowy. But I wouldn't call it extremely matte either. Maybe somewhere in-between, but more toward the matte side. I typically like to use dewy, glowy skincare, so I would probably use this product at night for that reason.

The packaging is a nice 60ml tube with a flip-top cap. A little goes a long way, and I imagine this tube will last me a while. At $19.99 for 60ml / 2.02 fl. oz., it's an excellent deal. Especially because the ingredient list is nice.

I haven't been using it long enough to speak on the long-term results, but I do like the cream so far, and I will definitely continue to use it. I would recommend this to anyone who likes the ingredient list and wants to give it a try.

A NOTE TO CELLEANSER: It would be wonderful to add accurate, full ingredient lists to all of your products listed on Amazon. It would go a long way toward helping your customers save time and make informed decisions without any hesitations or uncertainties. Thank you!

INGREDIENTS:

Water, Cetearyl Alcohol, Propanediol, Glycerin, Macadamia Ternifolia Seed Oil, Pentaerythrityl Tetraethylhexanoate, Caprylyl Methicone, Phenyl Trimethicone, Glyceryl Stearate, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Extract, 1,2-Hexanediol, Solanum Lycopersicum (Tomato Glycopersicum) Fruit Extract (Toma) , Potentilla Chinensis Extract, Cornus Officinalis Fruit Extract, Taraxacum Officinale (Dandelion) Leaf Extract, Narcissus Tazetta Bulb Extract, Asiaticoside, Madecassic Acid, Asiatic Acid, Centella Asiatica Leaf Extract, Rehmannia Chinensis Root Extract, Angelica Gigas Extract, Polyglyceryl-3 Methylglucose , Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Extract, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Extract, Thymus Vulgaris (Thyme) Extract, Origanum Vulgare Flower/Leaf/Stem Extract, Paeonia Lactiflora Extract, Citric Acid, Astragalus Membranaceus Extract,Carbomer, Ziziphus Jujuba Fruit Extract, Xanthan Gum, Tromethamine, Ethylhexylglycerin, Dipotassium Glycyrrhizate, Caprylyl Glycol, Hydroxyacetophenone, Adenosine, Disodium EDTA, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Oil, Linalool. [5.0/5] my new favorite The moisturiser is creamy without feeling greasy. I have combination skin that can lean more towards the oily side depending on what part of my cycle I am on. It is gentle on my skin and even if I am having a breakout of hormonal acne it does not irritate my already inflamed skin. I use it in conjunction with the toner and I can see a difference in the feel and look of my skin. I use a small amount after applying my toner and serum and it blends in perfectly with the other items in my skin care regimen. It has a barely there scent that smells of moisturizer. The cream works well with my primers and foundation and I have not noticed any pilling of product when layering. The minamalist packaging is nice and gives the product a high class feel. The box it came in is basic but when opened reveals a beautiful interior which mirrors the results of this product. Simple and elegant on the outside but amazing on the inside. A good add to your beauty routine or even as part of a self care gift or kit. I look forward to seeing what will be added to the items this brand makes. [5.0/5] Smells like the spa! So I was confused because I thought this was a cleanser (because it's called "clean cream") but its a moisturizer. It works great and smells incredible! [5.0/5] Lovely moisturizer I like this moisturizer, though I'm not 100% sure that it's for everyone. It is light, but it does take a bit more time than usual to fully absorb into the skin. It's vegan though and it has this deliciously eucalyptus clean smell. I think that makes it appropriate for people who have a little of an acne issue or for folks that are men. I happen to really like the scent. [5.0/5] great product for vegans This is a great product because it uses vegan ingrediants. it doesnt bother or irritate my skin and it makes me feel refreshed. [5.0/5] Love this cleanser! I am careful about what I put on my skin but I started using this cleanser every morning and noticed drastic results in brake outs and the clarity of my skin. The bottle is smaller than expected, but I will definitely be buying this again. [5.0/5] Clean Cream Great product!! Works well on the skin keeping it moisture all day!! I highly recommend it!! Has a great smell to it!! Love it [5.0/5] Vegan and gluten-free I have overly sensitive skin and I also have Graves’ disease so my body is really sensitive to gluten and animal products. This works amazing on my skin it’s lightweight and smells like tea tree. I love it. Not a single breakout since I started using it [5.0/5] Very gentle cream I got this after getting their serum. I used this for a week and I have not complaints!

It is very gentle with almost no fragrance but a subtle one after putting on the cream.

I usually have some breakouts after starting a new line, and so far --- nada.

After a week it is pretty safe, and I enjoy using this product.

I am thinking of purchasing a second one after this. [5.0/5] ALL DAY MOISTURE It is a great moisturizer and face feels so soft. The scent is not bad at all. I actually am surprised with this because I am very particular about my face creams. This is a product that I would totally recommend. [5.0/5] Highly Recommend!! I am so glad that finally I found this product.
It was challenging to find good products that don't cause irritation, and I had some skin issues when I use other new products.
But now, it has been solved. My skin feels softer and more moisturized than ever. Also, I love its scent. It is so fresh and makes me calm.
I believe it is because this product is a vegan product.
Definitely recommend!

response:
Here is a summary of the product reviews:

The Celleanser Vegan Clean Cream and related products (toner, serum) are overwhelmingly well-received, with most reviewers giving 5 out of 5 stars. Customers consistently praise the cream for being lightweight, non-greasy, and effective at moisturizing and hydrating the skin throughout the day. Many note that it absorbs quickly and does not cause breakouts or irritation, making it suitable for sensitive skin types, including those prone to hormonal acne.

The scent is frequently mentioned as a positive, described as mild, herbal, earthy, or spa-like, though a couple of reviewers found it slightly medicinal. The vegan and cruelty-free nature of the product is a significant selling point for many customers. Several reviewers appreciate the clean, quality ingredients and the elegant packaging.

A few minor criticisms include a lack of English instructions on the packaging, with most information provided only in Korean. One reviewer noted that the cream provides limited hydration on its own and recommended pairing it with another product for better results. Another mentioned that the finish leans more matte than dewy, making it better suited for nighttime use for those who prefer a glowy look.

Overall, customers highly recommend the product, with many stating they plan to repurchase and noting visible improvements in skin softness, clarity, and hydration.
